prompt_text: Write a recommendation letter for Brett who is applying to a design program. Mention creativity and iteration based feedback.
response_text:
[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Your Institution]
[Date]

[Recipient's Name]
[Recipient's Title]
[Design Program Name]
[Program Address]

Dear [Recipient's Name],

I am writing to wholeheartedly recommend Brett for admission to your esteemed design program. As Brett's [supervisor/mentor/teacher], I have had the pleasure of observing and guiding their growth as a designer over the past [X] years.

Brett is an exceptionally talented and creative individual with a unique ability to approach design challenges from multiple angles. Their passion for design is evident in every project they undertake, and their dedication to pushing the boundaries of what is possible is inspiring. Throughout their time in our program, Brett has consistently demonstrated a keen eye for detail, a deep understanding of design principles, and a willingness to take calculated risks.

One of Brett's greatest strengths is their ability to receive and incorporate feedback. They thrive in an environment where iteration and refinement are encouraged, and they have consistently demonstrated a willingness to revisit and revise their work based on constructive criticism. This ability to iterate and refine their designs has allowed Brett to produce high-quality work that is both visually stunning and functionally effective.

Brett's design process is characterized by a deep empathy for the user, a keen understanding of the context, and a commitment to creating solutions that are both innovative and practical. Their work is a testament to their ability to balance form and function, and their passion for design is evident in every aspect of their projects.

I have no doubt that Brett would be an excellent fit for your design program. Their creativity, work ethic, and dedication to the craft of design make them an exceptional candidate. I strongly recommend Brett for admission to your program, and I am confident that they will make valuable contributions to your community of designers.

If you have any further questions, please do not hesitate to contact me. I would be more than happy to provide any additional information or support.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Your Institution]
